---
title: "Video Games - CORGIS.edu"
author: "Felix G."
date: "2025-03-28"
date-modified: "2025-03-28"
categories: [code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
format:
  html:
    theme: solar
embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
# Load resources
library(tidyverse)

VGamesData <- read.csv("Data/video_games.csv")
head(VGamesData)
```

```{r}
Games <- tibble(
  
)
```
